zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Herries於1390年10月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾吉德布萊特時，她的父親Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles10歲，母親Lady Margaret Douglas11歲。她於1422年與Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年3月9日在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Herries于1390年10月1日出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾吉德布萊特时，她的父亲Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles10岁，母亲Lady Margaret Douglas11岁。她于1422年与Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年3月9日在英国苏格兰藍納可爾享年48岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Herries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, Scottish, English: locative name from Hérils in Trévières (Calvados). The name in England may have died out before the end of the medieval period, but survived into the modern period in Scotland.
2 English: variant of Herry with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Harris .

variants.name: Herry
meanings: Scots: Herry, to plunder, most properly to plunder birds' nests

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Herries was born on 1 October 1390, in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles, was 10 and her mother, Lady Margaret Douglas, was 11. She married Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell in 1422, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 9 March 1439, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Herries est née le 1 octobre 1390, à Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Douglas, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell en 1422, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1439, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Herries am 1. Oktober 1390 in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles 10 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Douglas 11. Sie hat 1422 in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. März 1439 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell nel 1422, nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Janet Herriesが1390年10月1日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルククウドブリトで生まれた時，父Sir Herbert Herries third of Terreglesは10歳，母Lady Margaret Douglasは11歳であった。1422年にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスでHerbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年3月9日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアで48歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Herries(이)가 1390년 10월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 커kc드브라이트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Douglas(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 3월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Herries nasceu em 1 de outubro de 1390, em Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Douglas, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell em 1422, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1439, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Herries родилась 1 октября 1390 г. в местности кирккудбраит, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Douglas, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell в 1422 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 9 марта 1439 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell en 1422, en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1439, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
